name: Automate
description: Run commands at different parts of the instance lifecycle with no coding knowledge

controls.name: Before Launch
controls.description: Commands to run before the instance is launched. Launch will be blocked until the command finishes.

controls.name: On Launch
controls.description: Commands to run when the instance is launched. Launch will not be blocked.

controls.name: On Stop
controls.description: Commands to run when the instance exits
